TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Valau ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 273 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 271 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun93%, Amis2%, Tayan1%, Paywan1%, Setik1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Valau hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Valau hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Valau hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valau hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valau hya' ga Tavila. tay mkyahu' na Valau hya' ga Nakahila. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Valau ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *alau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun**%, amis~ɕ*%, tajan*%, pajwan*%, s~ɕetik*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa ta*ila. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħila. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *alau ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Valau ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 273 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 271 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun93%, Amis2%, Tayan1%, Paywan1%, Setik1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Valau hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Valau hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Valau hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valau hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valau hya' ga Tavila. tay mkyahu' na Valau hya' ga Nakahila. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Valau ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *alau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun**%, amis~ɕ*%, tajan*%, pajwan*%, s~ɕetik*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa ta*ila. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alau ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħila. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *alau ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
